items.question: How do I book a lesson?
items.answer: Find a tutor, choose an available time slot and confirm the booking. The tutor will receive a notification and confirm the appointment.

items.question: How does the lesson work?
items.answer: Lessons take place via video call. After booking, you'll receive a link to your lesson. You can test your camera and microphone in advance under Settings → Test camera.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: Payment is processed through the platform. Supported methods: credit card, PayPal and bank transfer.

items.question: Can I cancel a lesson?
items.answer: Yes, free of charge up to 24 hours before the lesson. Late cancellations may incur a fee.

items.question: How do I become a tutor on TutorsMD?
items.answer: Register as a tutor, fill in your profile and wait for approval from our team. This usually takes 1–3 business days.
